description: Geometry-specific structural manifest validation -- per-geometry Zod refinements ensuring plane keys in the manifest match the geometry's expected slot requirements (e.g., tunnel requires floor, left_wall, right_wall, end_wall). Enforces required vs optional slots, validates geometry name existence. Structural validation only -- spatial compatibility rules (camera+geometry compatibility) come from OBJ-041 and are additive. Covers TC-07.
notes: Tier 2 engine core. Boundary clarification: OBJ-017 = structural correctness, OBJ-041 = spatial correctness. Spec completed via 4-round deliberation. Key decisions: minimal ValidatableGeometry interface (D-09) avoids type mismatch between OBJ-004 ManifestRegistry and OBJ-005 GeometryRegistry; function injection (D-02) for testability; early exit on unknown geometry (D-03); deterministic alphabetical error ordering (D-11). Authoritative source for UNKNOWN_GEOMETRY, MISSING_REQUIRED_SLOT, UNKNOWN_SLOT error codes.
